text: Monica: I can't believe you ate my last piece of cake! Joey: It was just sitting there! She didn't even put her name on it!
scene_description: Monica's apartment, kitchen area. Monica is standing by the refrigerator looking upset.

text: Ross: So I told her about the fossil discovery. Rachel: And she was interested? Ross: She fell asleep. Chandler: Shocking.
scene_description: Central Perk. The group is sitting on the couch.

text: Phoebe: My grandmother always said that lobsters mate for life. So she's his lobster! Rachel: That's the sweetest thing I've ever heard.
scene_description: Monica's apartment, living room. Phoebe is telling a story to the group.

text: Chandler: Could this day BE any worse? Joey: How about this - my agent called and I didn't get the part. Chandler: Okay, you win.
scene_description: Joey and Chandler's apartment. Both are sitting at the counter.

text: Rachel: I got the job at Ralph Lauren! Monica: Oh my God, that's amazing! I'm so proud of you! Ross: We should celebrate.
scene_description: Monica's apartment. Rachel has just come through the door excitedly.

text: Joey: Hey, how you doin'? Woman: Excuse me? Joey: I said, how you doin'? Chandler: And he wonders why he's single.
scene_description: A coffee shop. Joey is talking to a woman at the counter.

text: Monica: Everything has to be perfect for the dinner party. The napkins need to be folded exactly the same way. Chandler: She's been like this all day.
scene_description: Monica's apartment. Monica is setting the table meticulously.

text: Ross: We were on a break! Rachel: A break from us doesn't mean you can do whatever you want! Phoebe: Here they go again.
scene_description: Central Perk. Ross and Rachel are arguing while others watch.

text: Phoebe: Smelly cat, smelly cat, what are they feeding you? Joey: She's been singing that for three hours. Monica: Someone make her stop.
scene_description: Central Perk. Phoebe is performing with her guitar.

text: Chandler: So I told my boss the joke about the duck. He didn't laugh. Joey: Was it the one about the duck and the soap? Chandler: Different duck.
scene_description: Joey and Chandler's apartment, evening. They are watching TV.
